summary: Hydrated preflight shows no security-sensitive items. The original representative #47549 is already closed, and current main at dac72374944f35fb89e21dce0f3f2299f27d03c9 carries the threadId preservation fixes for the closed family. The only open candidate, #58397, is related sessions_send announce work but not a high-confidence duplicate or superseded closeout because it has unique fail-closed zero-timeout behavior plus an unresolved latest Codex review finding. No mutating close/comment/label action is planned.

actions.reason: Keep #58397 open as related follow-up work, not as the canonical duplicate target for the closed threadId-preservation cluster.
